title: Day 15 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these 3 sentences:  

Sentence 1 - かんじと  カタカナと  どちらが　むずかしい  ですか。 = Between kanji and katakana which one is more difficult?

Sentence 2 - かんじの　ほうが　むずかしい　です。 = Kanji is harder.

Sentence 3 - どちらも　むずかしい　です。 = Both are hard.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard.  Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
